title: Afghanistan
field_advice_levels: Do not travel to Afghanistan overall due to the volatile security situation and the threat of terrorist attack.

title: Colombia
field_advice_levels: Reconsider your need to travel to Colombia overall. Do not travel to: the departments of Arauca, Cauca (excluding Popayan), Norte de Santander (excluding Cucuta), and Narino (excluding Pasto and Ipiales). Reconsider your need to travel to: the city of Buenaventura and the Pacific coast.

title: Mexico
field_overall_advice_level: Exercise a high degree of caution
field_advice_levels: Exercise a high degree of caution in Mexico overall. Do not travel to: the states of Colima, Guerrero, Michoacan, Sinaloa, Tamaulipas and Zacatecas. Reconsider your need to travel to: the states of Chiapas, Chihuahua, Durango, Guanajuato, Jalisco, Morelos and Sonora.

title: Japan
field_advice_levels: Exercise normal safety precautions in Japan overall.

title: Côte d'Ivoire (Ivory Coast)
field_overall_advice_level: Exercise a high degree of caution
field_advice_levels: Exercise a high degree of caution in Côte d'Ivoire overall.
